name: browser-pet-extension
description: Context-aware browser pet extension using clawd-pet SVGs.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist assets dist/wasm dist/options && esbuild content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none && esbuild background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=iife --platform=browser --external:fs --external:path --external:url --external:sharp --external:onnxruntime-node --legal-comments=none && esbuild offscreen.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/offscreen.js --format=iife --platform=browser --external:fs --external:path --external:url --external:sharp --external:onnxruntime-node --legal-comments=none && esbuild popup/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none && esbuild options/options.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/options/options.js --format=iife --legal-comments=none && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp offscreen.html dist/ && cp -r assets dist/ && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm*.wasm dist/wasm/ && cp node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm*.mjs dist/wasm/ && mkdir -p dist/popup && cp popup/popup.html popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp -r onboarding dist/ && cp options/options.html options/options.css dist/options/
